ai_provider.title: AI Provider
ai_provider.description:
Choose how Culiplan AI features run in Home Assistant.

**Cloud AI** — Culiplan processes requests on your behalf. Free users get the standard set; Premium unlocks the advanced features (e.g. AI shopping list fill).
**BYOK** — Your API key is stored locally and sent directly to the AI provider; Culiplan never sees it.
**Local AI** — Requests go to your local Ollama or LM Studio endpoint.

ai_byok.title: Bring Your Own Key
ai_byok.description: Enter the provider and API key Culiplan should use. The key is stored in Home Assistant only — Culiplan never sees it.

data_description.byok_api_key: Stored in Home Assistant only — never sent to Culiplan.

ai_local.title: Local AI
ai_local.description:
Point Culiplan at your local Ollama or LM Studio instance.

{detected_endpoints}

local_endpoint_remote_warning.title: Remote AI Endpoint
local_endpoint_remote_warning.description:
The endpoint **{endpoint}** is on a remote host. Your AI prompts (which may include recipe names, meal plans, and pantry contents) will be sent to this address over your network.

If this is intentional (e.g. a server on your home network), you can continue. If you are unsure, go back and use `localhost` instead.

data.confirmed: I understand and want to continue

mealie_offer.title: Import from Mealie
mealie_offer.description: Culiplan can import your existing Mealie recipe library in one click. This is optional — you can always import later from the integration settings.

data.migrate_mealie: Import my Mealie recipe library now

mealie_credentials.title: Mealie Connection
mealie_credentials.description: Enter your Mealie server URL and an API token. The token is used only during import and is **never stored**.

data_description.mealie_token: Generate a token in Mealie → Profile → API Tokens. It will not be saved after import.

mealie_preview.title: Import Preview
mealie_preview.description:
Culiplan found the following in your Mealie library:

- **{will_import}** recipes ready to import
- **{will_flag}** recipes that need review
- **{will_skip}** recipes that will be skipped (duplicates)

Sample titles: {samples}

Confirm to start the import. You can undo this within 24 hours from the integration settings.

mealie_done.title: Import Complete
mealie_done.description:
Your Mealie recipe library has been imported into Culiplan.

- **Job ID**: {job_id}
- **Errors**: {errors} recipes could not be imported

You can roll back this import within 24 hours from the integration settings (Settings → Integrations → Culiplan → Configure).

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Culiplan
reauth_confirm.description: Your Culiplan session has expired. Click **Submit** to re-authenticate.

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key — please check the key and try again.
error.invalid_endpoint: Could not reach the local AI endpoint. Check the URL and that the service is running.
error.local_endpoint_unreachable: Could not reach the local AI endpoint. Check the URL and that the service is running.
error.local_endpoint_invalid: The endpoint URL is not valid. Use the format http://host:port (e.g. http://localhost:11434).
error.invalid_mealie_url: Please enter your Mealie server URL (e.g. http://192.168.1.10:9000).
error.mealie_unreachable: Could not connect to your Mealie server. Check the URL and that Mealie is running.
error.mealie_timeout: The connection to Mealie timed out. Check that Mealie is reachable from Home Assistant.
error.byok_provider_required: Please select an AI provider for BYOK mode.
error.byok_key_required: An API key is required for BYOK mode.
error.byok_key_invalid: The API key is invalid or was rejected by the provider. Please check your key and try again. Detail: {error_detail}
error.byok_validation_error: An unexpected error occurred while validating the key. Please try again. Detail: {error_detail}

abort.missing_configuration: Integration not configured. Please configure it in the UI.

data.rollback: Roll back Mealie import (available within 24 hours of import)

abort.rollback_complete: The Mealie import has been rolled back. Your Culiplan recipe library has been restored to its previous state.
abort.rollback_failed: The rollback request failed. Please try again or contact Culiplan support.

suggest_meal.name: Suggest a meal
suggest_meal.description: Asks Culiplan AI to suggest a meal. Fires culiplan_suggest_meal_result event and creates a persistent notification.

constraints.name: Constraints
constraints.description: Free-text dietary or preference constraints, e.g. "vegetarian, under 30 minutes".

meal_slot.name: Meal slot
meal_slot.description: Which meal of the day to suggest for (breakfast, lunch, dinner, snack).

max_time_minutes.name: Max cooking time (minutes)
max_time_minutes.description: Maximum total cooking time in minutes.

fill_shopping_list.name: Fill shopping list
fill_shopping_list.description: Asks Culiplan AI to populate the active shopping list for the planned meals of the given week. Fires culiplan_fill_shopping_list_result event.

week_offset.name: Week offset
week_offset.description: Which week to fill for (0 = this week, 1 = next week, -1 = last week).

start_cooking_mode.name: Start cooking mode
start_cooking_mode.description: Starts a guided cooking session for the given recipe.

advance_cooking_step.name: Advance to next cooking step
advance_cooking_step.description: Moves the active cooking session forward by one step.

set_recipe_timer.name: Set a recipe timer
set_recipe_timer.description: Adds a named timer to the active cooking session and starts the HA timer entity.

cancel_recipe_timer.name: Cancel a recipe timer
cancel_recipe_timer.description: Removes a named timer from the active cooking session.

resume_cooking_mode.name: Resume cooking mode
resume_cooking_mode.description: Resumes the most recently paused cooking session.

complete_cooking_mode.name: Complete cooking mode
complete_cooking_mode.description: Marks the active cooking session as completed.

generate_blueprint.name: Generate automation blueprint
generate_blueprint.description: Generates a Home Assistant automation blueprint YAML from a natural language description using Culiplan AI. Cloud AI mode requires Culiplan Premium; BYOK and Local AI modes are free.

prompt.name: Prompt
prompt.description: Natural language description of the automation you want to create.

available_entities.name: Available entities
available_entities.description: List of entity IDs available in your Home Assistant install (max 100).

install.name: Install blueprint
install.description: Write the generated YAML to config/blueprints/automation/culiplan/ and reload HA blueprints.

reauth_required.title: Re-authentication required for Culiplan
reauth_required.description: Your Culiplan session has expired. [Re-authenticate your account]({url}).

confirm.title: Upgrade Culiplan
confirm.description:
To use **{feature}**, you need a Culiplan Premium subscription.

[Open upgrade page]({upgrade_url})
